title: Lentil and Pilaf Bowl
description: A flavorful Indian-inspired bowl filled with tender lentils and fluffy pilaf, perfect for a quick and nutritious meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add lentils and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until lentils are tender.
While lentils cook, prepare the pilaf according to package instructions.
In a small bowl, mix ricotta cheese and feta cheese (if using).
To assemble the bowls, divide cooked lentils and pilaf between two bowls.
Top each bowl with a dollop of cheese mixture and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
